channel.title: releases on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in releases on Drupal WxT

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important Expect security releases to appear here within 24 hours of being reported upstream. Release Created Date Description v3.0.0-beta1 2019-09-18T01:42:21Z Features/Updates: Update Field Group to 3.0-rc1 Update Bootstrap to v3.18 and switch to yarn Update Simple Sitemap to 3.3 Minor README.md improvements Deprecated Entity Updates installer logic in Profile Update Bootstrap to 3.20 Performance: Performance degradation in Layout Builder Performance degradation in multi value fields Switch to a memory cache backend during installation Upgrade path:
